goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should leave on 'friday'.
The train should 'arrive by 12:30' and should depart from 'norwich'.
Make sure you get 'train ID', 'departure time', and 'travel time'.
You are also looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'all saints church'.
Make sure you get 'postcode', 'entrance fee', and 'area'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should leave on friday
The train should arrive by 12:30 and should depart from norwich
Make sure you get train ID, departure time, and travel time
You are also looking for a particular attraction. Its name is called all saints church
Make sure you get postcode, entrance fee, and area
